title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Bard AI Ltd
body: "Application number 4596  Applicant Google LLC objected to the name used by Bard AI Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 25 April 2024, the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Bard AI Ltd is changed to 14878455, Ltd. "
